One object. Every constraint. Always the right fit.

There's
always
one for all.

5+ years· 3 disciplines· Italy-based

00:00:00
Online · Italy
What I do

Three macro areas. Hover to explore what lives inside each one.

Product
Object design Furniture Packaging Consumer goods Prototyping
Industrial
Enclosures & systems DFM & tooling Materials research Mechanical design Wayfinding
Visual
Identity systems Print & editorial Signage Typography Art direction
Where I'm from

Born
south.
Grown
everywhere.

hover the pins

2000 — birthplace

Reggio
Calabria

Calabria, IT Born & raised

Tip of the boot. Grew up surrounded by craft, sea, and sun-bleached concrete. The south taught me that beauty and function are never separate.

2019 — formation

Florence

Tuscany, IT Design school

Renaissance city, design school. Where I learned to look at objects differently — form, proportion, history. Still the city that changed how I see.

Interests
drag to explore
Design
Objects, systems, the space between function and form. The art of building things.
Add image
Automotive
Motorsport, car culture, car styling. Gran Turismo 4. The car as the most culturally loaded object ever made.
Add image
Mobility
How people move, how a train is used, how a plane works, how a cockpit talks back. The interface between body and vehicle.
Add image
Photography
On a Nikon D7000, nothing fancy. Composition, light, timing. Photographs everything. Amateur by title but always filming.
Add image
Music Production
Ableton, mixing, sampling, late nights. Making music the same way I make objects — by feel first, then figure out why it works.
Add image
Tech
Consumer tech, mostly. The kind that ends up in your pocket or on your desk. Interested in how it's designed before how it works.
Add image
Languages
Ciao.
IT
Italiano
Madrelingua
La lingua con cui penso, progetto e discuto. Nessun filtro.
EN
English
B2 — Cambridge First
Used daily. Clients, briefs, research. Comfortable enough to argue in it.
FR
Français
B2 — ESABAC
Certified but rarely practiced. Gets the job done when needed.
